data.title: Write RED tests for _ticket_has_pil and _tag_add_checked
data.description:
Extend tests/unit/scripts/test-ticket-tag.sh with 9 new failing test functions covering PIL detection branches, guard wrapper behavior, and CLI PIL rejection.

testing_mode: RED

Test harness: source tests/lib/assert.sh and tests/lib/git-fixtures.sh; use clone_ticket_repo to create a temp repo. Do NOT manually set _TICKET_TEST_NO_SYNC=1 (git-fixtures.sh sets it automatically on line 29).

9 new test functions (all RED until Tasks 2/3):
1. test_ticket_has_pil_finds_pil_in_create_description
2. test_ticket_has_pil_finds_pil_in_edit_fields_description  (bug-fix branch: EDIT data.fields.description)
3. test_ticket_has_pil_finds_pil_in_comment_body
4. test_ticket_has_pil_returns_nonzero_when_absent
5. test_tag_add_checked_bypasses_check_for_non_brainstorm_tags
6. test_tag_add_checked_rejects_brainstorm_complete_without_pil
7. test_tag_add_checked_allows_brainstorm_complete_with_pil
8. test_ticket_tag_pil_round_trip
9. test_ticket_tag_cli_rejects_brainstorm_complete_without_pil — CLI ./ticket tag <id> brainstorm:complete (no PIL) fails non-zero; stderr contains 'Planning Intelligence Log' and '/dso:brainstorm'

.test-index additions (embedded source-mapping lines with RED bracket suffixes):
  plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh:tests/unit/scripts/test-ticket-tag.sh [test_ticket_has_pil_finds_pil_in_create_description]
  plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh:tests/unit/scripts/test-ticket-tag.sh [test_ticket_has_pil_finds_pil_in_edit_fields_description]
  plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh:tests/unit/scripts/test-ticket-tag.sh [test_ticket_has_pil_finds_pil_in_comment_body]
  plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh:tests/unit/scripts/test-ticket-tag.sh [test_ticket_has_pil_returns_nonzero_when_absent]
  plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh:tests/unit/scripts/test-ticket-tag.sh [test_tag_add_checked_bypasses_check_for_non_brainstorm_tags]
  plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh:tests/unit/scripts/test-ticket-tag.sh [test_tag_add_checked_rejects_brainstorm_complete_without_pil]
  plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh:tests/unit/scripts/test-ticket-tag.sh [test_tag_add_checked_allows_brainstorm_complete_with_pil]
  plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh:tests/unit/scripts/test-ticket-tag.sh [test_ticket_tag_pil_round_trip]
  plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-tag.sh:tests/unit/scripts/test-ticket-tag.sh [test_ticket_tag_cli_rejects_brainstorm_complete_without_pil]

AC: all 9 tests fail RED; bash tests/run-all.sh passes (all exempted via RED markers)

Files: tests/unit/scripts/test-ticket-tag.sh (EDIT), .test-index (EDIT)
